name: io.github.lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/contract-scanner
description: Smart contract security scanner — vulnerabilities, risk scores, and calldata decoding

environmentVariables.description: RPC endpoint URL (defaults to Base mainnet)
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Premium API key for unlimited scans
environmentVariables.name: THRYX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Basescan API key for fetching verified contract source code
environmentVariables.name: BASESCAN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Etherscan API key for fetching verified contract source code
environmentVariables.name: ETHERSCAN_API_KEY
